invariants_checked: do not focus on Open Claw as primary integration

summary: The corrected design now focuses on Codexter's Symphony-compatible invocation seam: WORKFLOW.md, WorkItem, BoardAdapter, ComputeSelector, CodexterRunEnvelope, and ProofPacket. Open Claw is no longer the primary design target.

rubric_sections.name: spec-contract
findings: The spec names the first slice narrowly enough: filesystem adapter, local Codex invocation, no daemon, no Linear adapter, no polling.
rubric_sections.next_action: Convert the spec into an impl-plan ticket for the first slice.

rubric_sections.name: implementation-plan
findings: The planned implementation sequence is clear, though autonomy readiness should be made more concrete in the first ticket.
rubric_sections.next_action: In the first ticket, spell out local-only credentials, workspace assumptions, and proof packet write paths.

rubric_sections.name: evidence-quality
findings: The scout run stores source summary, feature ledger, decision matrix, scorecard, and handoff without raw source text.
rubric_sections.next_action: Keep the source run as the evidence base for the first implementation ticket.

next_action: Create the first implementation ticket for WORKFLOW.md schema, WorkItem filesystem adapter, CodexterRunEnvelope handling in normal Codex sessions, and ProofPacket output.
